name: Frederick Jarvis Alley
findHeading: Start by finding Frederick Alley's headstone. It's marked with a star on the map below.
unlockPrompt: When you find his stone, enter the year of his death to unlock his story.

name: Israel & Polly Higgins
findHeading: Find Israel and Polly's shared headstone.
unlockPrompt: When you find their stone, enter the year of Israel's death to unlock their story.

name: Tobias Lord Roberts, Sr.
findHeading: Find Tobias Roberts Sr.'s headstone. His son and grandson are also named Tobias — make sure you've found the eldest of the three.
unlockPrompt: Enter the year Tobias Sr. was born to unlock his story.
